slides.title: Fire Extinguisher 🧯
slides.content:
When connecting to APIs, things fail (like no internet). 

Wrap risky code in a `try` block. If it crashes, the `catch` block catches the error instead of closing the app!

slides.title: Catching Errors

quizData.question: Which block guarantees your app handles unexpected errors smoothly?
quizData.explanation: `try` attempts the risky code, `catch` manages the failure gracefully.
